logline: A hitman must protect the witness who can bury him.
scene_beats: Derivation: apply the power rule d/dx[xⁿ] = n·xⁿ⁻¹ with n = 3:
This holds for all x ∈ ℝ. No further caveats required.
raw_final:
The derivative of x³ is **3x²**.

Derivation: apply the power rule d/dx[xⁿ] = n·xⁿ⁻¹ with n = 3:
  d/dx[x³] = 3·x² 

This holds for all x ∈ ℝ. No further caveats required.
